name: Yogurt - Cucumber Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Large seedless cucumber, peeled and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the cucumber, yogurt, honey, mint, garlic, olive oil, and cayenne.
2. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Just before serving, season with salt to taste.
